stylePresetNote: Every preview image was captured under the 'Vega' style preset (this library's default), not a neutral/preset-agnostic render. shadcn-compose ships 8 presets total (Vega, Nova, Maia, Lyra, Mira, Luma, Sera, Rhea), each changing shape/spacing/animation -- swapping presets would change these components' appearance without changing this file.

components.title: Button
components.description: Triggers an action or event. Supports six variants and five sizes.

components.title: Card
components.description: Displays content in a bordered container, with optional header and footer slots.

components.title: Badge
components.description: A small label used to highlight status, counts, or metadata.

components.title: Chip
components.description: A selectable tag, commonly used for filters or multi-select choices.

components.title: Text Field
components.description: A single-line or multi-line input with label, placeholder, and error states.

components.title: Text
components.description: Renders text using the design system's type scale, with an optional muted tone.

components.title: Label
components.description: A form-field label, optionally marked required.

components.title: Checkbox
components.description: A tri-state input control: unchecked, checked, or indeterminate.

components.title: Radio Group
components.description: A set of mutually exclusive options. Combine ShadcnRadioButton items inside ShadcnRadioGroup.

components.title: Switch
components.description: An on/off control for a single setting, applied immediately.

components.title: Toggle
components.description: A two-state button, commonly used for toolbar toggles like bold or italic.

components.title: Slider
components.description: An input for selecting a value from within a range by dragging a thumb.

components.title: Toggle Group
components.description: A segmented row of toggles for single- or multi-select, e.g. text formatting.

components.title: Stepper
components.description: A numbered multi-step progress indicator for wizards, onboarding, and checkout flows.

components.title: Input Group
components.description: Groups a text field with leading or trailing addons -- icons, static text, or buttons.

components.title: Button Group
components.description: Visually joins a row of buttons into a single segmented control.

components.title: Textarea
components.description: A multi-line text input, sharing the same border/focus spec as Text Field.

components.title: Field
components.description: A labeled control + description layout for building forms. Real shadcn/ui's form.tsx is a thin wrapper of these same primitives around react-hook-form; this library has no form-state dependency, so compose Field directly with your own hoisted state.

components.title: Input OTP
components.description: A one-time-passcode input with boxed slots that fill left-to-right.

components.title: Avatar
components.description: A circular user/entity image container with an initials fallback.

components.title: Aspect Ratio
components.description: Constrains content to a fixed width/height ratio.

components.title: Separator
components.description: A thin line for visually or semantically separating content. Matches real shadcn/ui: it has no built-in margin, so surrounding spacing is always the caller's responsibility -- via Arrangement.spacedBy or explicit padding, as shown in the examples below.

components.title: Kbd
components.description: A keyboard-shortcut label.

components.title: Item
components.description: A single row in a list of interactive/informational rows.

components.title: Empty
components.description: A centered placeholder for an empty list, search result, or state.

components.title: Alert
components.description: A short, prominent callout for important information.

components.title: Progress
components.description: A linear progress bar.

components.title: Skeleton
components.description: A pulsing placeholder block shown while content is loading.

components.title: Spinner
components.description: A spinning loading indicator.

components.title: Toast
components.description: A stackable, auto-dismissing notification queue. Real shadcn/ui's sonner.tsx wraps the separate `sonner` npm library; since there's no Compose Multiplatform equivalent, ShadcnToastState + ShadcnToaster reimplement that queue directly.

components.title: Collapsible
components.description: An expand/collapse container for showing or hiding content.

components.title: Accordion
components.description: A vertically-stacked set of collapsible sections.

components.title: Tabs
components.description: A segmented control for switching between related views.

components.title: Breadcrumb
components.description: A row of navigation links showing the current page's location in a hierarchy.

components.title: Tooltip
components.description: A small hover-triggered label for an interactive element.

components.title: Popover
components.description: A click-triggered anchored panel for rich content.

components.title: Hover Card
components.description: A hover-triggered panel for richer preview content than a Tooltip.

components.title: Dropdown Menu
components.description: An anchored list of actions, optionally grouped under labels and separators.

components.title: Context Menu
components.description: A menu triggered by right-click, opened at the cursor.

components.title: Dialog
components.description: A modal window layered over the page.

components.title: Alert Dialog
components.description: A Dialog that can't be dismissed by clicking outside -- requires an explicit choice.

components.title: Sheet
components.description: A modal panel that slides in from a screen edge.

components.title: Drawer
components.description: A modal panel that slides in from a screen edge and can be swiped back toward that edge to dismiss. Distinct from Sheet: same sliding-panel shape, but with real drag-to-dismiss physics.

components.title: Combobox
components.description: A select with a filterable/searchable option list.

components.title: Select
components.description: A plain (non-searchable) dropdown select. Unlike Combobox, the option list isn't filterable by typing.

components.title: Date Picker
components.description: A date picker built by composing Popover and Calendar -- not a standalone component in real shadcn/ui either.

components.title: Command
components.description: A searchable/filterable action list -- the building block behind a command palette.

components.title: Menubar
components.description: A horizontal row of menu triggers, desktop-app style.

components.title: Navigation Menu
components.description: A horizontal top-level site navigation row where some items open a panel of related links.

components.title: Table
components.description: A responsive data table with a bordered header and hairline row separators.

components.title: Pagination
components.description: Page-number navigation with Previous/Next controls and ellipsis gaps.

components.title: Scroll Area
components.description: A scrollable region with a slim custom scrollbar thumb instead of the native one.

components.title: Chart
components.description: A config-driven bar/line chart. Real shadcn/ui's chart.tsx wraps Recharts; since there is no Compose Multiplatform equivalent, this draws directly via Canvas.

components.title: Calendar
components.description: A single-month date picker grid with a highlighted selection and today marker.

components.title: Carousel
components.description: A swipeable, snap-scrolling set of slides, built directly on Compose's own Pager.

components.title: Resizable
components.description: Two panes divided by a draggable handle.

components.title: Sidebar
components.description: A collapsible side navigation rail with grouped menu sections and a main content inset.

components.title: Message
components.description: One chat-transcript row: avatar and content laid out side by side, mirrored for the sender's own messages.

components.title: Bubble
components.description: A single chat message bubble, self-aligned to the left or right of the transcript.

components.title: Attachment
components.description: A file-attachment chip for a chat composer's upload tray, with upload/processing/error states.

components.title: Marker
components.description: A labeled divider for a chat transcript, e.g. a date separator or a pinned-messages banner.

components.title: Message Scroller
components.description: A chat-transcript scroll container that follows new messages to the bottom -- but only while the reader hasn't scrolled away -- with a floating jump-to-bottom button when they have.

components.title: Shimmer
components.description: A sweeping highlight animation for "generating response"/"thinking" text states -- a modifier, not a standalone component.

components.title: Scroll Fade
components.description: A scroll-position-aware fade at the edges of a scrollable container, hinting overflow without a hard cut -- a modifier, not a standalone component.
